title: Mini F1bb  Saint Berdoodles
temperament: friendly, affectionate, intelligent, eager to please, loving, and very social. Very easy to train due to their intelligence and desire to please.
cardDesc: Our gorgeous mama, Everly (a Mini F1B St. Berdoodle), and handsome dad, Teddy (a Toy Poodle), have welcomed a beautiful new litter of Mini F1BB St. Berdoodles! This special generation gives these sweet puppies an exceptionally low-to-non-shedding coat, making them the perfect allergy-friendly companions. Raised with endless love and daily socialization, these smart, compact, and affectionate sweethearts are ready to bring a lifetime of joy to your family.
